index.label: QMD Index
index.help: Named QMD index used for recall

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant QMD memories before each response

recallMode.label: Recall Mode
recallMode.help: vsearch is the safest default because it avoids the heavier query model

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Capture high-signal user and assistant turns into governed markdown memory

governanceEnabled.label: Governance
governanceEnabled.help: Run dedupe, tier decay, and expiry archival on memory files

memoryRootDir.label: Memory Root
memoryRootDir.help: Where governed markdown memories are stored

updateIndexAfterWrite.label: Refresh QMD Index
updateIndexAfterWrite.help: Run qmd update after memory capture or governance changes
